initial_draft:
The other player is offering to give you 40 dollars. Since you have no resources to trade, this is a generous offer. Accepting it would give you 40 dollars, which is a significant gain. Rejecting it would mean losing any chance to gain resources in this game. Proposing a new trade isn't necessary since you have nothing to offer. Therefore, it's rational to accept this proposal.

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Accepting the offer is the best option since I gain 40 dollars with no risk. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Thank you for the generous offer! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
